title: Tojima Wants to Be a Kamen Rider
overview: Tanzaburo Tojima has always idolized Kamen Rider, to the point of wanting to be him. He turns 40 this year...

title: I Am Tackle
overview: Yuriko Okada has always idolized Electro-Wave Human Tackle. But seeing Tojima forces her into action...

title: I Love the Moment When Hate Turns to Love
overview: After their encounter with the real Shocker, Tojima meets someone who knows more about the evil organization.

title: Who Is the Strongest Kamen Rider?
overview: Mitsuba's girlfriend, Yukarisu, transforms into a Shocker Combatant and attacks Yuriko!

title: Let Me Be V3 Too
overview: Mitsuba's girlfriend, Yukarisu, is a member of Shocker. What will he do protect her from his brother, Ichiyo?

title: Order Some Snacks
overview: The gang gathers at a pub to discuss what's happened. But it's owner is Ichiyo and Mitsuba's resentful sister.

title: Let Me Join Shocker
overview: Nakao has a fateful encounter that makes him recount how he ended up as a Shocker-idolizing yakuza.

title: What's a Kamen Rider Do When A Dangerous Enemy Appears?
overview: Tojima and the gang now know that both Shocker and monsters are real. What's next?

title: Show Me Your Rider
overview: The tournament to decide the strongest begins, with Yukarisu and Tojima facing off.

title: Risk Your Life
overview: Yuriko and Tojima clash, with her superior technique frustrated by his bottomless resilience and power...

title: Tackle is the Strongest
overview: Both worn out from their previous battles, the tournament concludes with Mitsuba VS Yuriko.

title: I'll Take All You Riders On
overview: The gang has an unexpected encounter at Futaba's pub.

title: I Will Fight, and Die, Against Shocker
overview: Futaba's rage towards her brother, Ichiyo, reaches it's breaking point.

title: I Want to Learn More About Humans
overview: Will Futaba still be able to deny the existence of Shocker when she finds herself in a fight against Kumota?

title: The Masked Idol, Heavy Chop
overview: An encounter with a man from Sena's past deepens Kumota's curiosity about humans.

title: An Imposter Can't Beat the Real Deal
overview: Thunder Raiko finally comes for Yukarisu. Will the Riders be able to protect her from the Shocker assassin?

title: Everyone In The World Will Join Shocker
overview: Tojima reels from the most recent battle, while Ito, Sato, and Ishige stumble onto Bat Man's wicked plot...

title: I'll Fight Shocker Too
overview: Nakao and his underlings find a surprising sanctuary, as the Bat Man's Shocker idols continue to hunt them.

title: It'd Be an Honor to Die as a Rider
I Was Craving a Battle With Shocker
overview: Ichiyo introduces Nakao to someone who seems poised to figure out what it is he's lacking.

title: Becoming the Ultimate Monster
overview: Thunder Raiko tracks Nakao down, but his training has made him more than she can handle at first.

title: Shocker is on the Move
overview: Tojima and his fellow Riders unite, out to stop the Bat Man's mass recruitment scheme for Shocker.

title: Let's Do This, Shocker!
overview: The Bat Man intends to convert every visitor at an arena into a Shocker Combatant. Can the Riders stop him?

title: I Wouldn't Mind Dying Today
overview: Tojima and the Riders finally square off against the Bat Man. But can humans really defeat a Shocker monster?
